Tests WebMCP invokeTool command with cross-document navigation.
Enabling WebMCP Domain
Enabling Page Domain
\n--- Invoking navigate_tool ---
invokeTool response: {
    invocationId : <string 0>
}
toolResponded invocationId matches
toolResponded event: {
    invocationId : <string 0>
    output : [
        [0] : {
            cross-document : success
        }
    ]
    status : Completed
}
